arabic: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillahi walhamdu lillah, La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah...
translation: We have entered a new day and with it all dominion belongs to Allah...

arabic: Allahumma bika asbahna, wa bika amsayna...
translation: O Allah, by You we enter the morning and by You we enter the evening...

arabic: Allahumma Anta Rabbi la ilaha illa Anta...
translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You...

arabic: Allahumma inni asbahtu ush-hiduka wa ush-hidu hamalata 'arshika...
translation: O Allah, I have entered a new morning and call upon You to bear witness...
O Allah, whatever blessing I or any of your creation has risen upon...

arabic: Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afwa wal'afiyata fid-dunya wal akhirati...
translation: O Allah, I seek Your forgiveness and well-being in this world and the next...
O Allah, Knower of the unseen and the evident...

arabic: Ya Hayyu ya Qayyum, birahmatika astaghith...
translation: O Ever-Living One, O Self-Existing One, by Your mercy I call upon You...
We have entered a new day and with it all dominion which belongs to Allah...
We have entered a new day upon the natural religion of Islam...
O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge...
Glory and praise is to Allah by the multitude of His creation...
I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion...
In the Name of Allah, with Whose Name nothing can harm...
O Allah, grant health to my body, hearing, and sight...
Allah is sufficient for me. None has the right to be worshipped except Him...
Ayatul Kursi once, the 3 Quls three times each, and Durood 10 times.
